mapper.insert: INSERT INTO property_deal_cache ( property_type, deal_type, source_id, lawd_cd, sido_name, gugun_name, dong_name, property_name, deal_date, deal_amount, deposit_amount, monthly_rent_amount, exclusive_area, floor, build_year, jibun, latitude, longitude, source, cached_at ) VALUES ( #{propertyType}, #{dealType}, #{sourceId}, #{lawdCd}, #{sidoName}, #{gugunName}, #{dongName}, #{propertyName}, #{dealDate}, #{dealAmount}, #{depositAmount}, #{monthlyRentAmount}, #{exclusiveArea}, #{floor}, #{buildYear}, #{jibun}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{source}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE property_type = VALUES(property_type), deal_type = VALUES(deal_type), lawd_cd = VALUES(lawd_cd), sido_name = VALUES(sido_name), gugun_name = VALUES(gugun_name), dong_name = VALUES(dong_name), property_name = VALUES(property_name), deal_date = VALUES(deal_date), deal_amount = VALUES(deal_amount), deposit_amount = VALUES(deposit_amount), monthly_rent_amount = VALUES(monthly_rent_amount), exclusive_area = VALUES(exclusive_area), floor = VALUES(floor), build_year = VALUES(build_year), jibun = VALUES(jibun), latitude = VALUES(latitude), longitude = VALUES(longitude), source = VALUES(source), cached_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT LEFT(dong_code, 5) FROM dongcodes WHERE dong_code IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(dong_code) >= 5 ORDER BY LEFT(dong_code, 5)
